core_mechanism: quenched spatial disorder mapped onto a derived probability distribution of local ordering thresholds, so that isolated regions individually cross their local threshold and form locally-ordered 'islands' embedded in a disordered matrix above the global (mean-field) transition point — a rare-region / random-local-threshold mechanism
brief_reason: The abstract derives the probability distribution function of local pairing temperatures and gaps from disorder fluctuations and describes locally-ordered 'islands' forming above the mean-field transition, i.e. a spatial distribution of local critical thresholds driven by quenched randomness.
